summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADS Gupta Enterprise Infrastructure Hub transformation. All major features are functioning correctly with excellent design consistency.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button not visible on mobile viewport (390x844)

passed_tests: Navigation includes Login button with cyan border styling
Navigation shows AD-OS badge next to logo
Chatbot named 'THE NEURAL ORACLE' with correct greeting about Supply, Demand, and Marketplace Intelligence
Chatbot Quick Protocols: Marketplace Audit, Supply Yield Optimization, Demand Intelligence - all functional
Hub shows 6 protocol cards with correct badges (LIVE, ARCHIVES, COMMERCE, PUBLISHERS, ADVERTISERS, UTILITIES)
Hub card navigation to /blog, /marketplacesolutions working correctly
/marketplacesolutions page loads with all platform badges (Amazon, Walmart, Target, Blinkit, Swiggy, Zomato)
/marketplacesolutions features include Seller Hub Integration, Quick Commerce
/supply page loads with Neural Supply Protocol title and features (CTV/OTT Live-Bidding, In-App Identity, LLM Content Ingest APIs, CoMP)
/demand page loads with Universal Demand Engine title and features (Programmatic Bidders, A2A Protocols, Frequency Optimization)
/tools page shows 6 tool cards with Live/Beta badges
/aboutme page loads with 'THE FOUNDERS' CIRCLE' section
Founders' Circle shows Ranjan Dasgupta and Pousali Dasgupta cards with portfolio links
Founder portfolio buttons link to external adsgupta.com sites
Dark Mode design with #121212 background maintained across all pages
CTA button with glow-button styling functional
Chatbot interactive functionality (input, send, close) working properly
Hub card clicks navigate to correct pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile menu button visibility issue on mobile viewport. Button exists but not visible at 390x844 resolution.
